_comment: Source of truth for asset provenance, licensing, and visual-style metadata. One entry per pack. See AGENTS.md in this folder for how to read, add to, and maintain this file. Every directory under assets/ MUST have an entry here.

kaykit.look: Flat-shaded low-poly, painterly hand-authored palette texture atlas, soft rounded forms, warm saturated colors.
kaykit.scale: Real-world-ish, Y-up, ~1 Godot unit = 1 meter. Humanoids ~1.7-1.8u tall. Dungeon pieces snap to a 1-unit modular grid.
kaykit.rig: Shared KayKit humanoid skeleton; all KayKit characters reuse the KayKit Character Animations set.
kaykit.texture: A single shared palette PNG atlas per pack (e.g. *_texture.png); recoloring = remap UVs on the atlas, not per-mesh textures.
kaykit.notes: This is the project's primary 3D style. New 3D should join this group whenever possible — same-creator is the only hard guarantee that models blend.

kenney-2d.look: Clean vector/flat UI and input-prompt iconography.

game-icons-net.look: Monochrome single-path silhouette icons, recolored at runtime via modulate.
game-icons-net.notes: Inventory/ability iconography. Mixed individual authors under one CC BY license.

quaternius.look: Flat-shaded low-poly, cleaner/cartoonier than KayKit, single Atlas texture per model, slightly chunkier proportions.
quaternius.scale: Y-up, ~1 Godot unit = 1m, rigged humanoid armature (EnemyArmature/CharacterArmature) with its own animation set (Idle/Walk/Run/Attack/Death/HitReact).
quaternius.notes: A deliberate SECOND 3D style group, brought in for free CC0 animated monsters (KayKit has none free). Reads more cartoony than KayKit — acceptable for enemies, verified by in-engine side-by-side. Animation names differ per model; the enemy AnimationTree maps them per-monster.

unsorted.notes: Triage required — assign a real group or document why it stands alone.

packs.name: KayKit - Character Pack : Adventurers
packs.author: Kay Lousberg (KayKit)
packs.notes: Rigged/animated humanoid characters (Knight, Mage, Rogue, Barbarian) plus held weapon meshes. Player character source.

packs.name: KayKit - Dungeon Pack (legacy / pre-remaster)
packs.author: Kay Lousberg (KayKit)
packs.notes: Older dungeon prop/weapon set using the *.gltf.glb naming and rarity suffixes (_common/_uncommon/_rare). Kept alongside the remaster; prefer remastered where equivalents exist.

packs.name: KayKit - Dungeon Pack Remastered
packs.author: Kay Lousberg (KayKit)
packs.notes: Primary dungeon environment set (~200 modular pieces): walls, floors, banners, props. Drives level generation tiling.

packs.name: KayKit - Skeletons Character Pack
packs.author: Kay Lousberg (KayKit)
packs.notes: Animated skeleton enemies + modular skeleton parts/weapons. Current enemy source.

packs.name: Kenney - Input Prompts
packs.author: Kenney (kenney.nl)
packs.notes: Keyboard + Xbox controller button prompt SVGs for UI hints. Directory name keeps the original 'kenny' spelling.

packs.name: game-icons.net icon set
packs.author: Various authors via game-icons.net (per-icon attribution required)
packs.notes: ATTRIBUTION REQUIRED. Item/equipment SVG icons. Each icon has an individual author that must be credited in shipped builds. Per-icon authorship is not yet recorded here — needs backfill (see AGENTS.md).

packs.name: Quaternius low-poly animated monsters (via Poly Pizza)
packs.author: Quaternius
packs.notes: Coherent vertex-colored CC0 monster set fetched via the assets skill's Poly Pizza channel: orc, blue-demon, ghost, yeti, slime-enemy, bat, spider. Wired as enemies under scenes/enemies/{orc,demon,ghost,yeti,slime,bat,spider}/. NOTE: Quaternius ships multiple visual sub-series; the textured-atlas EnemyArmature ones (goblin, zombie) clash with this vertex-color set and were intentionally excluded. Rigs differ per body type (CharacterArmature/MonsterArmature/BatArmature/SpiderArmature), so each .glb.import sets loop_mode on its own looping clips and each scene maps its own clip names. Scales are per-model starting points to be eyeballed; bat/ghost are flyers given a model Y-offset to hover (movement is still ground-based).

packs.name: UI background art (unverified)
packs.author: UNKNOWN — needs triage
packs.notes: main_menu_background.png has no recorded source or license. MUST be triaged before shipping: confirm origin/terms, or replace with an asset of known provenance.
